Oracc: HBTIN — Hellenistic Babylonia: Texts, Iconography, Names

HANE/M 8, 323-324 [Sale of shares in butcher's prebend][via hbtin]

Obverse
o 1o 1

m⸢ina*-qi₂*-bit*-d*⸣60 DUMU ša₂ mdna-na-a-MU DUMU ša₂ ⸢mni-din-tu₄⸣-d*60* A mki-din-dAMAR.UTU ina ḫu-ud lib₃-bi-šu₂1

o 22

ši-in-ze-ru-u₂ ša₂ ina 1en u₄-mu ina mi-šil ina U₄ 4-KAM₂ U₄ 5-KAM₂ U₄ 6-KAM₂ U₄ 7-KAM₂

o 33

U₄ 8-KAM₂ U₄ 9-KAM₂ PAP ši-in-ze-ru-u₂ ša₂ 1en u₄-mu ina u₄-mu-MEŠ MU-MEŠ GIŠ.ŠUB.BA-šu₂

o 44

lu₂GIR₂.LA₂u₂-tu₂ IGI d60 an-tu₄ dINANA dGAŠAN-EDIN dna-na-a dGAŠAN-ša₂-re-eš <<d*šar*-ra*-ḫi*-i*-tu₄*>> u DINGIR-MEŠ E₂-šu₂-nu2

o 55

gab-bi ša₂ ITIus-su kal MU.AN.NA gu-uq-qa-ne₂-e U₄.EŠ.EŠ-MEŠ u mim-ma gab-bi

o 66

ša₂ a-na ši-in-ze-ru-u₂ ša₂ 1en u₄-mu ina u₄-mu-MEŠ MU-MEŠ GIŠ.ŠUB.BA lu₂GIR₂.LA₂u₂-tu₂ MU-MEŠ

o 77

ik-kaš-ši-du ša₂ KI mla-ba-ši lu₂ma-ḫi-ra-nu GIŠ.ŠUB.BA MU-MEŠ DUMU ša₂ md60-NUMUN-MU

o 88

u mina-qi₂-bit-d60 lu₂na-din-na GIŠ.ŠUB.BA MU-MEŠ DUMU ša₂ mdna-na-a-MU u lu₂EN-MEŠ ḪA.LA-MEŠ-šu₂-nu gab-bi

o 99

a-na 1/2 MA.NA 5 GIN₂ KU₃.BABBAR is-ta-tir-ra-nu ša₂ man-ti-ʾi-i-ku-su bab-ba-nu-⸢u₂⸣-[tu₂]

o 1010

a-na ŠAM₂ TIL-MEŠ a-na mla-ba-ši DUMU ša₂ md60-NUMUN-MU A mE₂.KUR-za-kir a-na u₄-mu ṣa-a-⸢tu₄*⸣3

o 1111

it-ta-din KU₃.BABBAR a₄ 1/2 MA.NA 5 GIN₂ ŠAM₂ ši-in-ze-ru-u₂ ša₂ 1en u₄-mu ina u₄-mu-MEŠ

o 1212

MU-MEŠ GIŠ.ŠUB.BA lu₂GIR₂.LA₂u₂-tu₂ MU-MEŠ mina-qi₂-bit-d60 ina ŠU-MIN mla-ba-ši ma-ḫir e-ṭir₃

o 1313

u₄-mu pa-qa-ri ana muḫ-ḫi ši-in-ze-ru-u₂ ša₂ 1en u₄-mu ina u₄-mu-MEŠ MU-MEŠ ⸢GIŠ.ŠUB*.BA⸣4

o 1414

lu₂GIR₂.LA₂u₂-tu₂ MU-MEŠ it-tab-šu-u₂ mina-qi₂-bit-d60

Reverse
r 1r 1

[lu₂*]⸢na*-din*-na*⸣ GIŠ*.ŠUB*.BA* MU*-⸢MEŠ* DUMU*⸣ ša₂* m*⸢d*⸣[na*]-na*-a*-MU* u₂-mar-⸢raq*⸣-[ma a-di 12-TA.AM₃ a-na]5

r 22

⸢mla-ba-ši DUMU ša₂ md60-NUMUN-MU a-na u₄-mu⸣ ṣa-a-tu₄ ina-⸢an-din ši*⸣-[in-ze-ru-u₂ ša₂ ina 1en u₄-mu]6

r 33

ina mi-šil ⸢ina*⸣ [U₄] 4-⸢KAM₂* U₄*⸣ 5-⸢KAM₂ U₄⸣ 6-[KAM₂] ⸢U₄⸣ 7-KAM₂ U₄ 8-KAM₂ U₄ ⸢9⸣-[KAM₂ PAP ši-in-ze-ru-u₂]7

r 44

ša₂ 1en u₄-mu ina ⸢u₄*⸣-[mu]-⸢MEŠ MU⸣-MEŠ ⸢GIŠ.ŠUB⸣.BA lu₂⸢GIR₂.LA₂⸣u₂-tu₂ MU-⸢MEŠ⸣ [ša₂ mla-ba-ši DUMU ša₂ md60-NUMUN-MU]

r 55

A mE₂.KUR-za-kir a-na u₄-mu ṣa-a-tu₄ šu₂-nu

(witnesses)
r 66

lu₂mu-kin₇

r 77

mša₂-d60-iš-⸢šu-u₂ DUMU⸣ ša₂ mni-⸢din*-tu₄-d*⸣60 A mḫun-⸢zu*-u₂* m*d*⸣60-ik-ṣur DUMU ša₂ mina*-qi₂*-⸢bit*-d*60*⸣ u*? ⸢m*d*⸣[x x] x x8

r 88

A mŠEŠ-ʾu-⸢u₂*-tu₂* mta-nit-tu₄⸣-d60 ⸢DUMU* ša₂* m*ba*⸣-la-ṭu A m⸢lu-uš-tam-mar-d*IŠKUR* m*⸣[d]⸢60*-DIN*iṭ* DUMU*⸣ ša₂9

r 99

mdna-na-a-⸢MU*⸣ A m⸢ŠEŠ-ʾu-u₂-tu₂⸣ m⸢d*⸣60-⸢DIN⸣[iṭ] ⸢DUMU* ša₂* m*la*⸣-[ba-ši] ⸢A* m*kur*⸣-[i m liGIŠ] ⸢DUMU* ša₂*⸣ x-x-x

r 1010

A mŠU-d60 m liGIŠ ⸢DUMU⸣ [ša₂] m[...] ⸢mina?-qi₂?-bit-d?60?⸣

r 1111

md60-ŠEŠ-MUnu ⸢DUMU ša₂ m⸣[...]-x-x-tu₂-u₂ A ⸢mŠU-d60⸣

r 1212

md60-ŠEŠ-⸢MEŠ⸣-[... ...]-dGAŠAN ⸢A m⸣[x-... ...]-u₂10

(colophon)
r 1313

md60-⸢DIN*⸣iṭ lu₂⸢UMBISAG* DUMU* ša₂* m*d*60*⸣ x ⸢UNUG*ki* itiGAN*⸣11

r 1414

md60-ŠEŠ-MEŠ-MU

1= BM 105197; after transliteration in HANE 8, 323-324;duplicate of BM 109960 (=HANE 8, 325-326); collations LPearce 2009 note collate kidin-Marduk, cf. first line of duplicate (RW): LEP 6/9/2009 {m}ki-din-{d}AMAR-UTU clear

2collation LEP, 6/2009 <<{d*}šar*-ra*-hi*-i*-tu₄*>> not on tablet, inserted by Corò

3collation LEP, 6/2009

4collation LEP, 6/2009

5collation LEP, 6/2009. first half of line omitted by Corò

6collation LEP, 6/2009

7collation LEP, 6/2009

8collation LP, 6/2009

9collation LP, 6/2009, iṭ is cramped

10no space for uninscribed line as Corò layout suggests

11collation LP, 6/2009
